title: Avengers: Endgame
overview: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins due to the efforts of the Mad Titan, Thanos. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers must assemble once more in order to undo Thanos' actions and restore order to the universe once and for all, no matter what consequences may be in store.

title: Tad and The Magic Lamp
overview: Tadeo, his girlfriend Sara, and his friends Momia, Jeff, and Belzoni embark on an adventure after Tadeo accidentally unleashes an ancient spell.

title: Mayday
overview: When a U.S. Navy pilot on a top-secret mission during the Cold War gets trapped behind enemy lines, his only chance at survival is to form an alliance with an eccentric ex-KGB agent.

title: Saccharine
overview: After succumbing to an obscure weight-loss craze involving the eating of human ashes, lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the person she's eating.

title: Doutor Monstro
overview: A stubborn prosecutor is tasked with putting a plastic surgeon in jail who confessed to killing and dismembering a former patient. What should be an easy case ends up becoming one of the most difficult and disturbing jobs of his career. More than presenting incontrovertible proof and evidence, she will have the challenge of making the jurors -and millions of Brazilians- forget the absurd thesis, constructed with the help of the media by a brilliant lawyer, that the defendant is not a cold-blooded killer and cruel, but a peaceful good man, driven crazy by the unhealthy pursuit of an ex-girlfriend.

title: The Devil at the Door
overview: When an ancient collective fear returns to a small town, a young man must face alone the horrors that lurk in his bedroom.

title: The Magic Faraway Tree
overview: A modern family relocates to the countryside where the children discover a magical tree with eccentric residents. They're transported to fantastical lands, rekindling their family bond through adventures.

title: The Big Trip 3: Race Around the World
overview: The heroes of the first part return and team up with the characters of the second part of the Big Trip franchise! But their enemies Python and Vulture are not asleep either! Where it all started, that's where it all ends! And our heroes will win as always!

title: Monica's Gang: The Movie
overview: Plot TBA. Based on the popular comic book series.

title: See you Tomorrow
overview: Upcoming short film. Fernando's official directorial debut. Plot TBA.

title: Resident Evil
overview: A hapless courier tasked with delivering a package to a remote hospital finds himself caught in the middle of an outbreak and must fight through hordes of mutated creatures to survive.

title: Cantos Escuros 2: A Madição de Safira
Forgotten Island
overview: Jo and Raissa find themselves stranded on the fantastic world of the forgotten island of Nakali. They find that their only way home might come at the expense of a lifetime of memories and emotions.

title: Vira-Lata
overview: Odete and her daughters face financial difficulties after the death of her husband, Suelen, the middle daughter, cannot fit into the new routine, Sara, the youngest daughter, believes that the world is going to end.
